Package microui

Class RendererConfig

java.lang.Object
microui.RendererConfig

Provides setting for configuration of rendering mode

  • Method Details

    • getMode

      public static RendererConfig.Mode getMode()
      Returns the current rendering mode for MicroUI components.

      The mode determines how strictly MicroUI components validate and execute their internal rendering logic. This affects only the behavior of MicroUI components, not the overall rendering architecture.

      Returns:
      the current rendering mode (never null)
      See Also:
      • setMode(Mode)
      • RendererConfig.Mode

    • setMode

      public static void setMode(RendererConfig.Mode mode)
      Sets the rendering mode for all MicroUI components.

      Note: This affects only MicroUI components like Button, Slider, Panel, etc.

      Parameters:
      mode - the new rendering mode for MicroUI components (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if mode is null
      See Also:
      • getMode()
      • RendererConfig.Mode
